name: PandaDoc
h1: Build AI Agents That Work with PandaDoc
metaTitle: Build PandaDoc AI Agents with DocsBot Skill Builder
metaDescription: Create DocsBot AI agents that use PandaDoc to find document status, generate summaries, prepare handoffs, and trigger approved document workflows securely.
intro: PandaDoc helps teams create, manage, track, and e-sign important business documents such as proposals, quotes, and agreements. With DocsBot Skill Builder, you can describe in plain language how you want an AI agent to use PandaDoc, and DocsBot helps design, secure, test, and publish that ability as a reusable Skill. The result is a support or internal AI agent that can answer questions, look up document details, trigger approved workflows, and keep teams moving without manual busywork.
supportUseCases: Let a customer-facing DocsBot agent check the status of a proposal, quote, or agreement in PandaDoc and explain the next step to the customer.
Use a support agent to confirm whether a document was viewed, completed, or signed so customers get a fast status update in chat or by ticket reply.
Have the agent gather missing information from a customer, prepare a document-related handoff summary, and route the case to sales or account management.
Enable the agent to create an approved follow-up task or workflow when a customer needs a corrected quote, updated agreement, or resend request.
Let the agent summarize recent PandaDoc activity on a document so customers receive a clear update without waiting for a human review.
internalUseCases: Give employees a private AI agent they can chat with to find PandaDoc document status, ownership, recipients, and recent activity without opening multiple systems.
Let sales, success, or operations teams ask the agent to summarize outstanding proposals, expiring agreements, or unsigned documents and recommend the next step.
Enable employees in Slack or Microsoft Teams to have the agent prepare document follow-up notes, handoff summaries, or account update drafts based on PandaDoc data.
Use an internal agent to support SOPs by checking document progress, identifying stalled approvals, and triggering approved reminders or follow-up workflows.
Help finance, legal, or customer success teams chat with the agent to research document history and gather the context needed before responding to a customer or internal request.
whatYouCanBuild: A Skill that checks PandaDoc document status and explains the latest milestone to customers or employees.
A Skill that summarizes viewed, signed, expired, or pending documents for account and support teams.
A Skill that prepares handoff notes when a customer needs quote corrections or contract follow-up.
A Skill that triggers approved reminder or resend workflows for selected PandaDoc documents.
A Skill that finds document owners, recipients, and timestamps to speed internal research workflows.
A Skill that drafts account update summaries from PandaDoc activity for sales and customer success teams.

howItWorks.title: Describe the outcome
howItWorks.description: You tell Skill Builder what you want the agent to do with PandaDoc in plain language, such as checking document status, summarizing activity, or triggering an approved follow-up.

howItWorks.title: Skill Builder designs it
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder turns that goal into a secure Skill design, identifies the configuration it needs, and sets up safe connection and authentication handling without exposing credentials in chats or source.

howItWorks.title: Security is built in
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder protects and proxies secrets through secure runtime configuration, scopes PandaDoc access to the minimum actions and records needed, and adds approval boundaries for sensitive updates or workflow triggers.

howItWorks.title: It tests real scenarios
howItWorks.description: The automated testing agent runs imagined customer support and internal team scenarios, finds bugs, weak instructions, or permission gaps, and feeds those findings into an automated improvement loop.

howItWorks.title: Publish to the right agent
howItWorks.description: Once the Skill is refined, Skill Builder helps publish it to your customer-facing DocsBot widget, helpdesk agent, or private team assistant so it can answer questions and take bounded action in PandaDoc.

faq.question: How can I build an AI agent that works with PandaDoc?
faq.answer: With DocsBot Skill Builder, you describe the PandaDoc workflow you want in plain language, and Skill Builder helps design, secure, test, and publish a reusable Skill for your DocsBot agent. That Skill can support lookups, summaries, handoffs, workflow triggers, and other bounded actions you approve.

faq.question: Can an AI support agent use PandaDoc data to answer customer questions?
faq.answer: Yes, a DocsBot support agent can use a PandaDoc Skill to look up document status, recent activity, ownership, or signing progress while replying in a website chat widget or helpdesk conversation. You control what data it can access and what actions it is allowed to take.

faq.question: What PandaDoc customer support workflows can DocsBot automate?
faq.answer: DocsBot can help automate status checks, document activity summaries, resend or follow-up workflows, and handoff preparation when a customer needs help with a proposal, quote, or agreement. Sensitive actions can be limited or placed behind approval boundaries.

faq.question: Can an internal AI assistant help employees work faster with PandaDoc?
faq.answer: Yes, internal teams can chat with a private DocsBot agent in chat, Slack, or Microsoft Teams to find document details, summarize outstanding agreements, research history, and complete approved document-related workflows. This helps teams follow SOPs and reduce manual searching across systems.

faq.question: How does DocsBot keep PandaDoc actions secure?
faq.answer: Skill Builder defines the required configuration, handles authentication safely, keeps secrets out of conversations and generated content, and proxies credentials through secure runtime settings. It also scopes permissions to the minimum needed and can require approval for higher-risk actions.

faq.question: Can DocsBot update records or trigger workflows in PandaDoc?
faq.answer: DocsBot Skills can be designed to take approved actions such as triggering reminders, preparing handoffs, or updating workflow state where your rules allow it. The exact actions are bounded by the permissions, approvals, and limits you choose during setup.

brand.title: PandaDoc
brand.description: PandaDoc is a document management platform that simplifies the creation, management, tracking, and e-signing of business documents. It streamlines workflows for proposals, quotes, and other important documents, making it easier for businesses to operate efficiently. With top-rated solutions and compliance with major security standards such as SOC 2, HIPAA, and GDPR, PandaDoc is trusted by over 50,000 clients to handle their critical documents.
brand.slogan: Simplify document workflows and close deals faster with PandaDoc.
